en.name: Breakout
en.desc: Atari's 1976 brick-breaking classic! Use your paddle to bounce the ball and destroy all bricks. Each brick type has different point values. Pure arcade bliss!
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys to move the paddle. Bounce the ball to break bricks. Clear all bricks to win. You have 3 lives - lose one when ball falls below paddle.
tips: Angle your shots to hit more bricks
Aim for the top to cascade through rows
Keep the ball near center for control

zh.name: 打砖块
zh.desc: 雅达利1976年打砖块经典！使用挡板弹跳球并消灭所有砖块。每种砖块有不同分值。纯粹的街机乐趣！
zh.howToPlay: 使用左右方向键或鼠标移动挡板。让球保持反弹并击碎砖块。不要让球掉落！某些砖块需要多次击打或会掉落道具。
tips: 利用挡板的不同位置来控制反弹角度
优先击碎难以到达区域的砖块
利用道具获得额外球或其他加成
